creator: mark@grondar.za
text:
CTAN has upgraded (I don't know when) TeX and LaTeX, so when I fetched
the tarballs, they did not agree with the MD5 checksums off Freefall.

Fix: 

Remove the TeX/LateX files from Freefall, then make makesum.
How-To-Repeat: 
Remove the TeX tar files from Freefall, then make checksum.
